creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 255536
Sample Makefile (reduced from devel/raknet)

With the sample Makefile (reduced from devel/raknet) portlint -C gives

  WARN: Makefile: "NOT_FOR_ARCHS_REASON" has to appear earlier.
  WARN: Makefile: "NOT_FOR_ARCHS" has to appear earlier.
  WARN: Makefile: "NOT_FOR_ARCHS_REASON" has to appear earlier.

That is, '"NOT_FOR_ARCHS_REASON" has to appear earlier' appears twice.
